_finding: OLS on the corpus reveals that 'wave' and 'neg_inst_pct' (as currently labelled) do not track T+1 magnitude as the legacy formula assumed: wave-3 events have SMALLER T+1 moves than wave-1 (corpus wave=3 captures slow-burn institutional escalation, wave=1 includes flash events like the Saudi-Russia oil war). Applying these coefficients in production would invert the simulator's intended behaviour. The honest fix is metric re-definition (e.g. 'event speed' as a separate dimension from 'crisis depth'), not a coefficient swap.
method: OLS on log|t1_real| with log-space features and wave dummies
